title: James Steffes
compiled_truth: James Steffes is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-24), James Steffes sent 433 and received 4865 emails, totalling 5298 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (263), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (241), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (161), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (147), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (117).
